name: CI/CD Process
description: CALM architecture validation and deployment pipeline. Validates an architecture against a pattern using the CALM CLI, then generates and applies Kubernetes manifests or a Docker Compose file.

nodes.name: Deployment Operator
nodes.description: Developer or CI runner that invokes the validate-and-deploy script

nodes.name: CALM CLI
nodes.description: FINOS CALM CLI tool that validates architectures against patterns and renders architecture templates into deployment manifests

nodes.name: Architecture File
nodes.description: CALM architecture JSON file describing the system to be deployed (e.g. my-fullstack-k8s.architecture.json)

nodes.name: Pattern File
nodes.description: CALM pattern JSON file defining the structural constraints the architecture must conform to (docs/calm/patterns/my-fullstack.pattern.json)

nodes.name: URL Mapping
nodes.description: JSON file mapping schema $ref URLs to local file paths, used during validation (docs/calm/url-mapping.json)

nodes.name: Kubernetes Manifest Template
nodes.description: Handlebars template rendered by the CALM CLI into a Kubernetes manifest file (docs/calm/templates/k8s-manifests.yaml.hbs)

nodes.name: Docker Compose Template
nodes.description: Handlebars template rendered by the CALM CLI into a Docker Compose file (docs/calm/templates/dc-compose.yaml.hbs)

nodes.name: Generated Kubernetes Manifests
nodes.description: Kubernetes manifest YAML file generated from the architecture by the CALM CLI (calm-generated-k8s/all-manifests.yaml)

nodes.name: Generated Docker Compose File
nodes.description: Docker Compose YAML file generated from the architecture by the CALM CLI (calm-generated-dc/docker-compose.yml)

nodes.name: Kubernetes Cluster
nodes.description: Target Kubernetes cluster to which manifests are applied via kubectl

nodes.name: Docker Engine
nodes.description: Target Docker host on which services are started via docker compose

relationships.description: Reads and validates the architecture from
Reads the structural pattern constraints from
Reads the Kubernetes manifest Handlebars template from
Reads the Docker Compose Handlebars template from
Renders the architecture into Kubernetes manifests and writes to
Renders the architecture into a Docker Compose file and writes to
Starts services defined in the generated compose file on
